meta.disciplines: Product Strategy, Visual Design, Interaction Design, AI-Assisted Discovery, Front-End Prototyping, Technical Documentation
meta.notes: A human-directed AI workflow for taking digital products from early sketches to refined interfaces, working HTML, CSS, and JavaScript prototypes, and developer-ready specifications. Using AI as a design and engineering partner, I direct discovery, evaluate recommendations, refine interactions, review code, document decisions, and maintain ownership of the final product experience.

meta.disciplines: Design system pattern contribution, Cross-functional agile teams, WCAG accessibility
meta.notes: Led production-ready visual and UI design across web, mobile apps, and AI chat experiences in a highly regulated healthcare environment. Designed and maintained WCAG 2.1–compliant components, layouts, and visual systems supporting marketing, product, and communications initiatives. Partnered cross-functionally with UX, Product, Engineering, Content, and Marketing to deliver dev-ready designs with minimal oversight, balancing accessibility, brand integrity, and speed at enterprise scale.
meta.caption: Above: Florida Blue Mobile App

meta.disciplines: Shipped app store feature, Engineering collaboration, Lead UX Designer
meta.notes: Designed and shipped a scalable social communication feature with cross-functional teams within a proprietary cruise app operating on a bandwidth-constrained ship network. Created wireframes, interaction flows and native visual assets, updated development repositories, and validated builds across emulators and actual devices.

meta.disciplines: User interface design, Prototyping, Internal tool
meta.notes: Designed a custom Material Design based visual skin for an internal sales and client-facing prototype platform. Focused on visual clarity, brand adaptability, and front-end feasibility to support rapid demos, stakeholder presentations, and iterative product conversations across hospitality and entertainment clients.
meta.caption: Above: AWD custom skin for internal sales platform

meta.disciplines: Web + graphic design, Web development, Print + video production, Photography, Social media, HTML emails, Vendor management
meta.notes: Led visual design across print, digital, web, and social channels for a major exhibition campaign. Delivered catalogue design, magazine ads, digital placements, website assets, and email communications, ensuring visual cohesion while coordinating with multiple stakeholders, vendors, and production timelines.
meta.caption: Above: Catalouge design by AWD

meta.notes: Supported a large-scale enterprise web migration by rebuilding legacy HTML pages into modern, standards-compliant layouts using semantic HTML and CSS. Ensured brand consistency, accessibility compliance, and cross-browser reliability while improving content structure, metadata, and long-term maintainability during a high-volume migration effort.
meta.caption: Image credit: Citrix.com

meta.notes: Modernized legacy, table-based web pages into semantic HTML and CSS for high-traffic cruise brand websites. Partnered with business and IT stakeholders to recommend front-end best practices, ensure cross-browser performance, and translate marketing designs into production-ready code under aggressive timelines.
meta.caption: Webpage shipped by AWD for RCCL

meta.disciplines: Information architecture, Web Governance, Technical writing, Content migration, QA
meta.notes: Created a content inventory and governance system to extract and standardize reusable assets across 88 national websites during a large-scale enterprise migration. Collaborated with marketing, SEO, and leadership teams to establish web governance practices and performed QA across a multi-site rebrand initiative.
